summary: Iteration 269 — Promo Delivery Challan packaging fixes (DO auto-promo + backend safety net) verified end-to-end. All 3 backend pytest assertions pass and the frontend DO form's packaging dropdown is populated via the promo_stock_out -> stock_out -> master fallback chain. The recurring production bug 'crate prints as 1 Bottle' is fixed across BOTH the manual promo path (iteration_268) AND the new auto-promo-from-DO path. No real Zoho push was triggered (drafts only).
action_items: (OBSERVATION, non-blocking) The auto-promo path in /app/backend/routes/delivery_orders.py::_auto_create_draft_promo passes the DO's unit_price through to create_promo_dispatch, which then divides by units_per_package (treating it as a PER-PACK price). Brief reads 'unit_price = a per-bottle price (e.g. 112)' for DO input — if DO unit_price is meant to be PER-BOTTLE, the auto-promo should NOT divide. Currently with DO unit_price=112 and Crate-12, the stored promo line is per-bottle=9.3333 and line_value=112 (per-crate semantics). Line VALUE is preserved either way, so Zoho amounts are correct; only the per-bottle rate label differs. Please confirm intended UoM convention for the DO form's unit_price.
critical_code_review_comments: _resolve_units() in /app/backend/routes/promo_dispatch.py (lines 600-615) correctly walks the fallback chain promo_stock_out -> stock_out -> master. It matches by packaging_type_id first, then packaging_type_name (case-insensitive trim). It only overrides when matched upp > 1, preserving the conservative legacy behavior for unknown packs.
Single bulk SKU fetch with projection ({_id:0, id:1, packaging_config:1}) avoids per-line round-trips — efficient.

When line names a packaging_type_name but no match is found AND no upp is supplied, packaging_type_id stays None and upp falls back to 1. This is the documented negative case (confirmed by test_negative_no_match_stays_qty_one).

_auto_create_draft_promo (delivery_orders.py:277-281) builds PromoDeliveryItemCreate WITHOUT explicitly passing packaging_type_name when DO items lack a pack name. That's fine — the safety net in create_promo_dispatch will still resolve from SKU config IF a name/id is present in DO items.
Per-bottle rounding to 4 decimals preserves total line value (line_value = bottles * per_bottle is computed BEFORE rounding effects matter in normal price ranges).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — DO form's do-item-pkg-0 lists Carton-6 (6) and Crate-12 (12) for Nyla 600ml/Silver via fallback

seed_data_creation: Tests created+deleted 2 DRAFT promo deliveries under Brian (id bb12d90e-...) and 1 DRAFT Delivery Order routed through submit -> approve -> place_order (auto-created promo at 'Test' distributor 99fb55dc-...). All cleanup successful. No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported: export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://logo-dimension-sync.preview.emergentagent.com. Login response field is `session_token`. Auto-promo route flows: POST /api/delivery-orders -> POST /api/delivery-orders/{id}/transition with action_key=submit then approve then place_order. After place_order, GET /api/delivery-orders/{id} exposes promo_dispatch_id. The promo is fetched via /api/distributors/{distributor_id}/promo-deliveries/{dispatch_id} — NOT via /api/distributor-deliveries/{id} (that returns 404 for promo dispatches). Empire Restaurant account routes to 'Test' distributor (id 99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04).
rca of the issue: The recurring production bug ('Qty 1 / 1 Bottle' for crate lines) had TWO surfaces: (a) The manual Promotional Stock-Out dialog — fixed in iteration_268 via PromoDispatchSection.promoPacksFor() fallback. (b) The Delivery Order auto-promo (place_order action) — this iteration. Older DO clients (and now-invalid auto-promo payloads) could send packaging_type_name without units_per_package, leaving create_promo_dispatch with upp=1 -> quantity stored as 1. The new _resolve_units() helper (promo_dispatch.py:600-615) repairs this by looking up units from the SKU's packaging_config (promo_stock_out -> stock_out -> master) when the line names a pack but lacks upp. VERIFIED: 1 crate Crate-12 omitting upp -> stored qty=12 bottles, packages=1, packaging_units=12, packaging_type_name='Crate - 12', packaging_type_id resolved. NEGATIVE case (Pallet-9999 doesn't exist in SKU config) -> stays qty=1 (no fabrication). DO auto-promo: place_order on a DO with 1 crate Crate-12 of Nyla 600 ml/Silver successfully creates a draft promo with qty=12, packages=1, packaging_units=12 and preserved line_value.
